//: Full-tree tsconfig — extends the baseline (tsconfig.json) and includes the
This IS the gate's typecheck config: `npm run typecheck` (and therefore
`npm run check`) run `tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.full.json`, at ZERO errors.
`npm run typecheck:domain` keeps the fast domain-only check.
JSX (src/components/**/*.jsx and src/pdf/**/*.jsx) is DELIBERATELY NOT in
this tsc gate. A previous include used the brace glob
`src/components/**/*.{js,jsx}` which tsc does NOT expand — so components were
silently unchecked. Including the JSX for real surfaces ~650 pre-existing
inferred-prop errors (JSX-in-JS without prop-types), which is its own
remediation project. Until that lands, JSX is covered by ESLint + the Vite
build (onwarn promotes unresolved named imports to errors) + the test suite,
NOT by tsc. Do not re-add a brace glob here — it reads as coverage that
Don't include `tests/` — the test files use vitest globals + JSX in JS
and would need their own includes/types config to typecheck cleanly.
